title: VKSM
body:
WARNING - This mod is still in alpha, changes can and will occur!

VKSM - Visnaa's Kitchen Sink Mod, as the name suggests, is a kitchen sink mod.

### 🛁 What is a "kitchen sink" mod?
Kitchen sink mods are nothing but mods that add varoius and often totally disconnected features. Mods like this one often make the game more exciting, fun, and maybe even weird. ### ⚙️ Features:
As already mentioned this mod is in alpha, so this list will change over time. - Bed Block - works similiar to tnt, useful for mining netherite. - Enac Ragus - opposite of sugar cane, maybe grows faster? - Sword Block - works like spikes that You may recognise from other mods. - Protected Chest - chest protected by a PIN that you created, very secure! - Tomato - just tomato, and tomato seeds, You can eat it if You want. More feature coming soon! ### 📦 Info for modpack developers:
Mod is under the MIT license, You can use this mod for your modpack, but make sure to mention it in credits!
